name: Camí de Cavalls · Stage 2: Es Grau – Cap de Favàritx
description: 8.6 km through the heart of the Parc Natural de s'Albufera des Grau, a UNESCO Biosphere Reserve, out to the lighthouse and the lunar landscape of black slate at Favàritx. Protected nature at its purest, without a single building on the horizon.

highlights: cross the only nature park in Menorca, the core of the Biosphere Reserve
finish among the black slate rocks and the Favàritx lighthouse
look out over the unspoilt coves of Tortuga and Presili halfway along
